info.title: Aurboda Health API
info.description: REST API for the Aurboda health tracking application. Track health metrics, activities, locations, and productivity data from multiple sources including Android Health Connect, Oura Ring, and RescueTime.

get.description: Query health metrics for a time range. Returns time series data with timestamps and values.

post.description: Add a manual health metric measurement.

get.description: Get a comprehensive summary of health data for a specific day including heart rate, steps, sleep, exercise, tags, productivity, and visited places.
Get aggregated statistics for a time period. Returns min/max/avg/stddev for each metric, trend compared to previous period, and data completeness.
Get tags/labels for a time range.

post.description: Add a manual tag/label to mark an activity or event.

delete.description: Delete a tag by its external ID.

parameters.name: externalId

schema.description: External ID of the tag to delete

parameters.description: External ID of the tag to delete

get.description: Get activities (sleep, exercise, meditation, nap) for a time range.
Get place visits for a time range.

delete.description: Delete a named location by its ID.

get.description: Get frequently visited locations that are not yet named. Detects places where user spent 60+ minutes.
Get all stored detected locations with visit statistics.

post.description: Create a named location from detected coordinates.

get.description: Get RescueTime productivity data for a time range.
Get user settings including birth date and effective HR zones. HR zones are used to calculate time spent in different heart rate zones during exercise.

patch.description: Update user settings. Can set birth date (for age-based HR zones) and/or custom HR zone thresholds.

get.description: Get the current sync status for Oura and RescueTime data sources. Shows last sync time, status, and any errors.

post.description: Sync data from Oura Ring API. Fetches cardiovascular age, readiness, resilience, sleep scores, meditation sessions, and tags.
Sync productivity data from RescueTime API. Fetches application and website usage with productivity scores.

radius.description: Radius in meters (uses suggested radius if not provided)

birth_date.description: Birth date (set to null to clear)

hr_zone_start.description: Custom HR zone thresholds (set to null to clear)

rescue_time_key.description: RescueTime API key (set to null to clear)

full_resync.description: If true, fetches all historical data

start_date.description: Start date for sync (only used with full_resync)

full_resync.description: If true, fetches all historical data

start_date.description: Start date for sync (only used with full_resync)

hrZoneSecs.description: Time spent in each HR zone during session

detectedLocationId.description: ID of detected location if source is detected

completenessPercent.description: Data completeness (days with data / total days)

outliers.description: Values more than 2 stddev from mean

hrZoneSecs.description: Time spent in each HR zone (for exercise)

detectedLocationId.description: ID of detected location if source is detected

oura_connected.description: Whether Oura is connected via OAuth

oura_configured.description: Whether Oura OAuth is configured on server

errorMessage.description: Error message if status is error
